name: pluginize
description: Personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins built and curated by Eka Wijaya Susilo.

plugins.name: linkedin-toolkit
plugins.description: Skills that audit and rewrite LinkedIn profiles end-to-end against 2026 best practices.

plugins.name: writing-toolkit
plugins.description: Skills for writing high-quality human-readable documents: sentence-level clarity, anti-AI-slop, audience awareness, document structure, and tech-doc templates (RFC, ADR).

plugins.name: prompt-engineering
plugins.description: Refine and polish input prompts — XML structuring, few-shot examples, output formats, instruction strictness, and untrusted-input delimiting — to improve LLM output quality and consistency.
